ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled] Here at Village Gate and while on patrolling duty, I cannot approve royal archive right until verification is complete.<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>Short note: Responses well-tailored to persona but could be more natural.

[baseline_no_context] Entry to this sacred place requires a special pass, granted only under specific circumstances.<TAB>3<TAB>2<TATB>4<TAB>5<TAB>Short note: Lacks context relevance and persona consistency; generic response.

The response is relevant to both context and persona but lacks naturalness in tone, which could be improved for a more believable NPC interaction. The overall quality of the dialogue needs enhancement by adding some personality traits or quirks that Gatekeeper might have.
